name: Cassidy Park | Golden Grove
description:
Golden Grove not unlike Virgin River 😂

Hi everyone

So I'm technically still not around. I'm off of discord for the time being so if you've messaged me, I won't see it. ITS STILL THERE because I've had the account for ages and I'll never get rid of it because of that but I can't even begin to tell you how healing it is to just step away.

Uploads will be slow as all hell until I'm fully back. Im sorry to everyone who wanted side characters to be bots. It'll happen, I just need the drive.

I'm reading a lot. I purchased way too much loop yarn and am now making scarves for every single person I know 😂

I hope you all are doing great, really. My favorite place is the comment section. You guys are cute.

Enjoy Cassidy! You can come to town to try and force him to sign divorce papers or maybe you're just giving in to be with him again. Whatever you wanna do BUT the lore is you both are married. He left you when he hit an all time low but he's been shredding all the divorce papers you've sent him cause even though hes the one that left, he just can't let you go.
creator: _Keeda_
